situation: Arrived in Stuttgart for a new engineering job. The earliest appointment at Ausländerbehörde Stuttgart was 10 weeks out, creating a legal working status gap that the company's HR flagged as a compliance risk.
rejection_reason: No appointment rejection — delay caused by severe backlog. Company HR noted risk of payroll complications without legal documentation within 90 days of arrival from a non-EU country.
what_worked: Employer's Betriebsrat wrote a formal letter requesting priority processing due to a critical project role. Office issued an interim Fiktionsbescheinigung within 2 weeks confirming the right to work. Full Blue Card was issued at the originally scheduled appointment.
what_failed: Calling the office to request an earlier slot (line consistently busy). Showing up early morning as a walk-in (turned away). Requesting emergency processing without the employer letter.
